headline: NextEra Energy (NEE) Pays $150 Million To Settle Political Interference Claims
summary: NextEra Energy subsidiary Florida Power and Light agreed to a $150 million settlement related to political interference allegations. The settlement arrives while NextEra Energy is pursuing a proposed $67 billion merger with Dominion Energy. The outcome may draw closer scrutiny from regulators reviewing the merger and from stakeholders focused on governance. NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE), recently trading at $85.73, is confronting fresh legal and reputational pressure at the same time it is...
